ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problem_instances" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem instance */,
  "problem_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem instance (e.g., depot, driver log, freecell, gripper, hanoi) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the problem instance was last updated */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the difficulty level of the problem instance */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or dataset from which the problem instance was derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "walker_types" (
  "walker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each walker type */,
  "walker_name" TEXT /* Name of the walker type (e.g., greedy, hill climber, probe, queue, same output, step back) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the walker type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the walker type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the walker type was last updated */,
  "complexity" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the complexity of the walker type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this walker type is the default choice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("walker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance */,
  "walker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the walker type */,
  "median_branching_factor" REAL /* Median branching factor for the problem instance and walker type */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful runs */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of runs that resulted in errors */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the run in megabytes */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the run in percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_walker_id FOREIGN KEY ("walker_id") REFERENCES walker_types ("walker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greedy_resume_walker_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful runs */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of runs that resulted in errors */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the run in megabytes */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the run in percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greedy_resume_walker_metrics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "greedy_walker_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful runs */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of runs that resulted in errors */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the run in megabytes */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the run in percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_greedy_walker_metrics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hill_climber_walker_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem instance */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in seconds */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful runs */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Percentage of runs that resulted in errors */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the run in megabytes */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the run in percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hill_climber_walker_metrics_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problem_instances ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
